Package org.eventb.ui.prettyprint

Interface IElementPrettyPrinter

All Known Implementing Classes:
ActionsPrettyPrinter, AxiomsPrettyPrinter, CarrierSetsPrettyPrinter, ComponentPrettyPrinter, ConstantsPrettyPrinter, DefaultPrettyPrinter, DependenciesPrettyPrinter, EventsPrettyPrinter, GuardsPrettyPrinter, InvariantsPrettyPrinter, ParametersPrettyPrinter, RefinesEventsPrettyPrint, VariablesPrettyPrinter, VariantsPrettyPrinter, WitnessesPrettyPrinter
public interface IElementPrettyPrinter
Interface for the extension of the pretty printer, that defines a pretty printer for a given element type, allowing the user to pretty print all elements of that type and append special keywords or details which are not part of the contribution items (e.g. properties calculated on elements). For a simple behavior it is sufficient to implement the prettyPrint() method only. 
 For all editor contributions below the root:
 The prefix (or special prefix) will be appended first for a given element type,
 For each element of this type
   Then beginning details for the element will be appended
   The pretty print of the element will be appended
     ---> the recursive traverse to continue pretty printing child elements
 EndFor
 The ending details for each element

This interface is intended to be implemented by clients.

Since:
1.3
See Also:
  • DefaultPrettyPrinter

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    appendBeginningDetails(IInternalElement elt, IPrettyPrintStream ps)
    Appends some details that contributors can calculate on a given element, and for which there is not representation in the data model.
    void
    appendEndingDetails(IInternalElement elt, IPrettyPrintStream ps)
    Appends some details that contributors can calculate on a given element, and for which there is no representation in the data model.
    boolean
    appendSpecialPrefix(IInternalElement parent, String defaultPrefix, IPrettyPrintStream ps, boolean empty)
    Appends a custom prefix, and should be used to replace the default prefix which is contributed to be appended.
    void
    prettyPrint(IInternalElement elt, IInternalElement parent, IPrettyPrintStream ps)
    Appends element pretty print to the given stream.

  • Method Details

    • prettyPrint

      void prettyPrint(IInternalElement elt, IInternalElement parent, IPrettyPrintStream ps)
      Appends element pretty print to the given stream.

      Example : This example shows the body of the prettyPrint method for the carrier set element pretty printer. 

       if (elt instanceof ICarrierSet) {
        final ICarrierSet set = (ICarrierSet) elt;
        try {
                ps.appendSetIdentifier(wrapString(set.getIdentifierString()));
        } catch (RodinDBException e) {
                EventBEditorUtils.debugAndLogError(e,
                                "Cannot get the identifier string for carrier set "
                                                + set.getElementName());
        }
 }
      where appendSetIdentifier is defined as follows : 
       private static void appendSetIdentifier(IPrettyPrintStream ps, String identifier) {
        ps.appendString(identifier, //
                        getHTMLBeginForCSSClass(SET_IDENTIFIER, //
                                        HorizontalAlignment.LEFT, //
                                        VerticalAlignement.MIDDLE), //
                        getHTMLEndForCSSClass(SET_IDENTIFIER, //
                                        HorizontalAlignment.LEFT, //
                                        VerticalAlignement.MIDDLE), //
                        SET_IDENTIFIER_SEPARATOR_BEGIN, //
                        SET_IDENTIFIER_SEPARATOR_END);
 }

      The following methods are intended to be used : PrettyPrintUtils.getHTMLBeginForCSSClass(String, HorizontalAlignment, VerticalAlignement) and PrettyPrintUtils.getHTMLEndForCSSClass(String, HorizontalAlignment, VerticalAlignement)

      Parameters:
      elt - the element that the pretty printer handles
      parent - the current parent element owning the child element with which this pretty printer is associated
      ps - the current pretty print stream

    • appendSpecialPrefix

      boolean appendSpecialPrefix(IInternalElement parent, String defaultPrefix, IPrettyPrintStream ps, boolean empty)
      Appends a custom prefix, and should be used to replace the default prefix which is contributed to be appended.

      Implementation example: ActionsPrettyPrinter.appendSpecialPrefix(IInternalElement, String, IPrettyPrintStream, boolean)

      Parameters:
      parent - the current parent that owns the child element linked to this pretty printer
      defaultPrefix - the default prefix that should by default be appended
      ps - the current pretty printing stream
      empty - a boolean indicating whether there is any child that this pretty printer handles
      Returns:
      true if a special prefix has been appended, false otherwise

    • appendBeginningDetails

      void appendBeginningDetails(IInternalElement elt, IPrettyPrintStream ps)
      Appends some details that contributors can calculate on a given element, and for which there is not representation in the data model. This method appends details before traversing the children of the given element elt.
      Parameters:
      elt - the element for which details are displayed
      ps - the current pretty print stream
      See Also:
      • StringBuilder)

    • appendEndingDetails

      void appendEndingDetails(IInternalElement elt, IPrettyPrintStream ps)
      Appends some details that contributors can calculate on a given element, and for which there is no representation in the data model. This method appends details after having traversed the children of the given element elt.
      Parameters:
      elt - the element for which details are displayed
      ps - the current pretty print stream
      See Also:
      • EventsPrettyPrinter.appendBeginningDetails(IInternalElement, IPrettyPrintStream)
